message: Mountain bike for sale - 21-speed, needs minor tune-up. Well-maintained, just needs basic adjustment. Asking $85. Happy to answer questions about condition and specs.
Hey everyone! 👋 Listing my Ninja blender — 900W, 2 years old, works like a dream. No issues at all. Asking $45. Great for smoothies, soups, anything really. Let me know if you're interested!
Looking for a basic tool set for home repairs and a wireless printer. Let me know if anyone has these available!
